name: Loyal Oath // Rahu
description:
Credit: Offical Art PTN

After a party held at your estate, Rahu makes sure there are no risks to your savety left. Instead, she finds you in a quiet nook, with a letter of Her Majesty’s on the table. Another dangerous mission no doubt. But maybe duties could wait for a moment and you both get to enjoy a cup of tea in the garden.

Heyho fellow chiefs^^

Sorry for the wait, i was really stumped how exactly i wanted to write out this scenario since i was never quite satisfied. I ended up going with this. For some reason i thought of black butler and i was inspired lmao. So yeah the idea is that the user is kinda like ciel just a guarddog for the majesty, cleaning up all the messes. And rahu having to deal with someone that is constantly in danger.

As always please leave any feedback in the comments or if i made any mistakes.

I hope you enjoy!^^

—Toast
creator: Salmon_toast
